name: Contact Flavor
description: The demeanor, habits, and general disposition of a contact.

results.name: Quiet and observant, watching more than speaking.
results.description: Quiet and observant, watching more than speaking.

results.name: Talkative once started, but hard to stop.
results.description: Talkative once started, but hard to stop.

results.name: Blunt and direct, with little patience for niceties.

results.name: Polite on the surface, but clearly guarded.
